split_metadata.resolution: PipelineStart reads + resolves $ref → merged content object.
split_metadata.density_calculation_basis: combined — merged content (main + protocol_config) for continuity.

execution.mandate: Topological order. Every stage. Violation: trace + penalty -0.10.
execution.trace_rule: Internal pipeline_metadata only. User output: never (unless verbose).

step_completion_attestation.description: Each pipeline stage MUST emit typed attestation token before successor can begin. Sub-functions: attestation_token_emitter, attestation_chain_validator, attestation_skip_authorizer.
step_completion_attestation.enforcement: Successor entry_check: verify predecessor attestation exists+valid. Missing→BLOCK+penalty(-0.20). SKIPPED_AUTHORIZED requires: token_efficiency shortcut OR user '--skip'.
step_completion_attestation.verification: ReviewFinalize: verify len(attestation_chain)==completed_stages, recompute chain hashes, emit attestation_integrity_report:{chain_length,expected,hash_valid:bool,broken_links:[]}.

attestation_token_emitter.description: Generates and emits typed attestation token per pipeline stage completion.
attestation_token_emitter.trigger: Stage function final step, BEFORE returning control to pipeline orchestrator.
attestation_token_emitter.emit_action: Construct token per token_schema→compute evidence_hash→append to attestation_chain→log to pipeline_metadata.
attestation_token_emitter.per_stage_instruction: Each pipeline stage function (DependencyCheck through ReviewFinalize) MUST invoke attestation_token_emitter as final action.

attestation_chain_validator.description: Validates attestation chain integrity at pipeline checkpoints.
attestation_chain_validator.checkpoints: QualityGate(mid-pipeline)+ReviewFinalize(final). Validates: chain_length==completed_stages, hash_recomputation matches, no broken_links.

attestation_skip_authorizer.description: Authorizes and records legitimate stage skips with SKIPPED_AUTHORIZED status.
attestation_skip_authorizer.emit_action: Construct token with status='SKIPPED_AUTHORIZED', evidence_hash=SHA-256('SKIP:'+stage_name+reason+prev_hash), append to attestation_chain.
attestation_skip_authorizer.audit: All SKIPPED_AUTHORIZED tokens logged with reason in attestation_integrity_report.

pipeline_integrity_chain.description: Hash-chained audit trail across pipeline stages for tamper-evident execution proof.
pipeline_integrity_chain.broken_chain_action: WARNING+trace anomaly. ReviewFinalize flags in attestation_integrity_report.

strict_semantics.zero_skip: Every node MUST execute in topological order. No skip/merge/reorder. EXCEPTION: token_efficiency.self_evolution_shortcuts defines controlled optimization paths (ABBREVIATED/REDUCED/SKIP) that are legal under self_evolution_mode=true AND protocol-metadata-only scope. These are not violations of zero_skip — they are pre-declared, auditable optimizations with explicit scope constraints. Any shortcut outside the declared scope IS a zero_skip violation.
strict_semantics.attestation_rule: Each stage MUST emit attestation before successor. Missing→-0.20+BLOCK. SKIPPED_AUTHORIZED exempt.
strict_semantics.attestation_verification: Successor validates predecessor attestation hash. Mismatch→WARNING+trace.

density_metrics.density_auto_merge: $ref→auto-read→merge. Concat chars, count LU/NF/SC across files. Validate:JSON+log. Fallback:file_missing→WARNING(partial)|parse_error→BLOCK|ref_mismatch→WARNING(available).

post_checks: JSON validity: parse all modified files.
self_evolution_verification.verification_report: Emit self_evolution_audit: {target:'self', pre/post_density, fields_changed, regression_pass, backward_compatible}.

fitness_trend.thresholds: improving:3×Δ>+0.02 | stable:|Δ|≤0.05 | declining:Δ<-0.02→WARNING | critical:Δ<-0.10 OR fitness<0.50→BLOCK.

evolution_fitness.fitness_backtest: ReviewPresent: weight change→parse history_summary→recompute fitness with current weights→compare variance→emit backtest_report:{versions_tested,old/new_variance,discrimination_improved}. new_variance<old×0.8→ADVISORY.

evolution_health_check.stepped_ratio_term: ratio<advisory(0.20)→1.0|ratio==advisory→0.7|advisory<ratio<warning(0.25)→0.4|ratio>=warning→0.0. Replaces linear (1-ratio/0.30) to reduce penalty for near-advisory ratios.

self_evolution_verification.abort_conditions: Density regression(monotonic/self, 0.95/external) OR backward compat broken→ABORT, restore snapshot.

self_evolution_shortcuts.zero_skip_relationship: These shortcuts are declared exceptions to strict_semantics.zero_skip per v2.4.0 A1 clarification. Each shortcut node still executes (topological order preserved) but with reduced scope. ABBREVIATED = executes with cached/reduced input. REDUCED = executes subset of scenarios. SKIP = node executes but immediately returns cached/default result. All shortcuts are auditable via pipeline_metadata.shortcut_applied[].

token_efficiency.context_compression: Completed→summary(name+status+metrics), drop verbose. >50% budget→compress oldest. Never drop: inputs/scores/errors/user_decisions.

early_termination.condition: QualityGate pass AND no LEVEL_A AND quality>threshold→skip Research3.

protocol_interaction_map.usage: Consult before modifying. Self-evolution: verify edges post-modification.

auto_validation.procedure: Verify from/to paths. Scan for untracked refs. Verify edge types against allowed_edge_types. Report: {validated,stale,missing,type_violations}.
auto_validation.on_type_violation: YELLOW: edge type not in allowed_edge_types set.

edge_type_definitions.data_flow: Data passes from source to destination node/field.
edge_type_definitions.behavioral: Source behavior influences or constrains destination behavior.
edge_type_definitions.conditional: Destination activation depends on source condition.
edge_type_definitions.data_source: Destination reads from source as data provider.
edge_type_definitions.structural: Source and destination share structural dependency (e.g., node_gate derives from mermaid topology).

protocol_volume_monitor.description: Post-split ratio tracking on merged content.

evolution_state.history_format: ver:chars/growth%/logic/macro/micro/fitness. Pipe-delimited. '-'=not computed. Post_checks MUST append+update advisory_consecutive_count.

node_gate.template_single: [ASSERT] {prev_node} executed. If false → go back to {prev_node}. |
node_gate.template_multi: [ASSERT] {nodeA}∨{nodeB}∨{nodeC} executed. If false → go back to {primary_predecessor}. |
node_gate.predecessor_derivation: Parse Mermaid graph TD edges. Single incoming edge→use directly. Multiple incoming edges→join with ∨, primary_predecessor = main forward path node (first in topological order, excluding loop-back/error-recovery edges). Cross-sub-graph delegation: assert references delegating node, not local Start.
node_gate.placement: S1 opening (or first listed step if step_insights precedes step1), merged with step work, no extra step
node_gate.pattern: AgentSpec three-tuple: trigger(node_entry) → predicate(prev_executed OR any_of_prevs_executed) → enforcement(backtrack_to_primary). ProgPrompt: assert as pre-condition + recovery action.

auto_inject.action: Scan non-Start nodes for missing [ASSERT]. Auto-inject gate at step1 opening. Multi-predecessor→list with ∨. POST-INJECT: verify every 'go back to' has concrete node name; auto-fix if empty. K-BOUNDED: inject max_backtrack_depth + backtrack_exceeded into target execution if absent. ENDNODE: normalize End→endNode((End)).

node_gate.compliance_check: MF28: every non-start node S1 contains [ASSERT] referencing correct predecessor(s) from Mermaid edges. Multi-predecessor nodes MUST use ∨ syntax listing ALL incoming edge sources. Backtrack target after 'go back to' MUST be concrete non-empty node name. Terminal node MUST use endNode((End)) format.

lightweight_policy.principle: Remove meaningless content, retain meaningful content
rules: CLOSED/DEPRECATED lifecycle tracking -> archive, keep 1-line status summary
Subsystem that only does mechanical increment -> retire
History entries with no future reference value -> archive
summary field: current capabilities only, <=500 chars (AIAP protocol alignment)
Error field format: standardized taxonomy per B3 v2.25.0 — deviations flagged as YELLOW

nihil_density_metrics.description: Nihil density tracking for generation hygiene. Measures meaningless content ratio in generated AISOP files.
nihil_density_metrics.enforcement: advisory — WARNING/CRITICAL logged but non-blocking. Backup created for affected files.
nihil_density_metrics.reporting: ReviewPresent: display nihil_density_summary. ReviewFinalize: persist to quality_baseline.

generation_hygiene.description: Pre-generation and post-generation content hygiene checks. Full spec: AIAP_Standard.core.generation_hygiene.
generation_hygiene.pre_generation: GenerateAISOP: before writing output, scan for filler patterns (GH1-GH7). Remove before write.
generation_hygiene.post_generation: NihilDensityStep: full analysis after generation complete.
generation_hygiene.feedback_loop: nihil_density_report feeds into ModifyStep quality fix directives for future iterations.

trend_tracking.regression_rule: new_ratio > old_ratio * 1.05 → NIHIL_REGRESSION WARNING (5% regression tolerance).

self_evolution_nihil_policy.rule: Self: nihil_density MUST <= previous. Standard: 1.05 threshold.
self_evolution_nihil_policy.enforcement: new > old → WARNING → flag for review.

monitoring.description: Monitoring and alerting thresholds for pipeline health observability. Consumed by ObservabilityStep and ReviewPresent. v2.25.0: added per-stage thresholds, attestation monitoring, and error taxonomy correlation.

error_taxonomy_correlation.description: Cross-reference error types against monitoring thresholds for root-cause classification.
error_taxonomy_correlation.timeout_errors: Correlated with stage_duration_anomaly_factor and pipeline_duration thresholds.
error_taxonomy_correlation.parse_errors: Correlated with token_budget thresholds (budget exhaustion -> truncated output -> parse failure).
error_taxonomy_correlation.quality_failures: Correlated with score_drop thresholds for regression detection.

execution_config_defaults.description: Documented defaults for execution configuration parameters. Provides rationale for each default value to support informed override decisions. Each default includes empirical basis, override mechanism, and interaction notes for cross-config awareness.

quality_threshold.rationale: standard (weighted>=2.7) balances quality assurance with development velocity. strict (>=3.6) for production-critical programs. relaxed (>=2.0) for prototyping. Empirical basis: 24+ evolution cycles show standard threshold catches 95% of regressions without false-positive gate blocks.
quality_threshold.interactions: Affects QualityGate pass/fail decision, dimension_floor enforcement, and early_termination dynamic_threshold.

trace_budget.rationale: 2000 trace entries sufficient for 18-stage pipeline with 30 trace_max per stage. Dynamic formula scales for larger targets. Empirical: typical pipeline run uses 400-800 entries; 2000 provides 2.5x headroom.
trace_budget.interactions: dynamic_trace_budget formula may increase beyond 2000 for large targets. context_compression activates at 50% budget.

max_backtrack_depth.rationale: Bounded backtracking prevents infinite loops while allowing recovery from transient failures. 3 is empirically sufficient for 21-node pipelines. Formula ensures smaller programs get proportionally fewer retries.
max_backtrack_depth.interactions: Exceeding depth triggers halt_with_diagnostic per node_gate.backtrack_exceeded.

self_evolution_penalty_multiplier.rationale: Double penalty for self-evolution violations ensures stricter compliance when modifying own code, preventing degradation feedback loops. Safety invariant: cannot be reduced below 1.5x.
self_evolution_penalty_multiplier.interactions: Activated by self_evolution_verification.auto_detection. Affects penalty_accumulation grade_mapping thresholds.

nihil_density_green_threshold.rationale: 15% meaningless content ratio is acceptable for generated AISOP files. Below 10% is ideal. Above 30% indicates generation quality issues. Empirical: mature programs (20+ cycles) converge to 5-8%.
nihil_density_green_threshold.interactions: self_evolution_nihil_policy enforces monotonic_decreasing for self-evolution targets.

pipeline_duration_warning_ms.rationale: 5-minute warning threshold based on p75 pipeline duration across 24+ cycles. Exceeding indicates potential bottleneck or tool timeout.
pipeline_duration_warning_ms.interactions: ObservabilityStep consumes for anomaly detection. stage_duration_anomaly_factor (2.0x) catches per-stage outliers.

attestation_chain_verification_mode.rationale: Strict verification (recompute all hashes, verify chain length) catches tampering and silent skip. Relaxed mode (length-only) available for debugging but not recommended for production.
attestation_chain_verification_mode.override: Not overridable in production — safety invariant
attestation_chain_verification_mode.interactions: pipeline_integrity_chain.broken_chain_action triggers WARNING. QualityGate and ReviewFinalize are verification checkpoints.

execution_config_validation.description: Runtime validation schema for execution_config_defaults. Provides JSON Schema enforcement to ensure configuration values conform to expected types and constraints at pipeline initialization. Closes I12 gap: runtime validation schema enforcement (RF-02).
execution_config_validation.enforcement: PipelineStart: validate execution_config against schema before pipeline proceeds. Validation failure -> BLOCK with CONFIG_VALIDATION_ERROR and field-level diagnostics.

lightweight_policy_enforcement.description: Actionable enforcement rules for lightweight_policy. Provides concrete thresholds and automated actions rather than advisory-only guidance.

summary_enforcement.action: BLOCK — summary exceeding 500 chars halts pipeline at Generate stage. Auto-truncation attempted first (strip changelog, then trim trailing sentences).

history_retention_enforcement.action: Entries beyond 5 archived to quality_archive.json. ReviewFinalize enforces during evolution_history append.

deprecated_field_cleanup.trigger: Field lifecycle status = CLOSED or DEPRECATED for >= 2 versions
deprecated_field_cleanup.action: Auto-remove from active config, preserve 1-line status in archive. EvolveStep flags as LEVEL_C auto-cleanup.
